script_text: Fact = true! Fact books are about real things.
You love bugs! Which fact book should you pick?
Pick a fact book on what you love!
What is a good way to find facts in a book?
Headings tell you what each part is about!
Why might a fact book have tricky words?
Tricky words usually name new things you are learning about!
Reading lots of different fact books helps you:
Every fact book teaches you something new!
